seoTitle: Matcham vs Mathoura — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Matcham and Mathoura. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Matcham and Mathoura.
heading: Matcham vs Mathoura — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Matcham, New South Wales and Mathoura, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Matcham has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Mathoura (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Matcham or Mathoura safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Matcham has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Mathoura scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Matcham scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Mathoura scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Matcham or Mathoura?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Matcham has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
